CustomField.description:
Enter the number of periodicity in months in which the MR Rates will be escalated throughout the lease term.
Below are the usages- 1. Rate Schedule Creation (Generate MR Schedule Button): Utilized in the calculation of escalation factor for creating MR Rate records in Supplement Rent. If not provided, the default value is 12.
2. LLP Price Catalog Summary Record Update: Used when updating Rate Schedules (MR Rate) under Supplement Rent records. The Escalation Periodicity (Months) field is considered in the calculation, defaulting to 12 if blank.
3. Fx Monthly Output Record Creation: Applied in the calculation of Fx Monthly Output records, considering the Escalation Periodicity (Months) field. Defaults to 12 if blank on the Supplement Rent record.
4. MR Calculation on Supplement Rent Utilization: The Escalation Periodicity (Months) value is considered in the calculation. If blank, it defaults to 12 during MR calculation on Supplement Rent utilization."
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Enter the number of periodicity in months in which the MR Rates will be escalated throughout the lease term.
CustomField.label: Escalation Periodicity (Months)
